name: Iso11783OPChangeFillAttribute
title: Iso11783OPChangeFillAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeFillAttribute( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword color, dword type, dword patternID );
description: The function changes the properties of a fill attribute object. A Change Fill Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
